cards.name: 5 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: hardship, loss, isolation, feeling abandoned, adversity, struggle, unemployment, alienation, disgrace

cards.name: 8 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: lack of quality, rushed job, bad reputation, lack of motivation, mediocrity, laziness, low skill, dead-end job

cards.name: Ace of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: new opportunities, resources, abundance, prosperity, security, stability, manifestation
